revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:千勝神社]]
== '''Chikatsu Shrines''' ([[:ja:千勝神社|千勝神社]]). == * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|千勝神社 (つくば市)|3=千勝神社 (つくば市)|3=千勝神社 (つくば市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Tsukuba)|qq=}} ({{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}} {{ill|Tsukuba|en|Tsukuba|qid=Q273863|lt=Tsukuba City|1=Tsukuba}}) - Relocated from the shrine below. ** {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja|千勝神社 (下妻市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Tsukuba)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 千勝神社 (つくば市)}} (Ibaraki Prefecture, {{ill|Shimotsuma, Ibaraki|en|Shimotsuma, Ibaraki|qid=Q533241|lt=Shimotsuma City|1=Shimotsuma, Ibaraki}}) - {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}: Former Village shrine. The original shrine of the above location. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honchō)|qq=}} ({{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}} {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki City|1=Kuki, Saitama}}) - Former Village shrine. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Yoshiba)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市吉羽)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Yoshiba)|qq=}} (Saitama Prefecture, Kuki City) - Former Village shrine. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Kamihayami)|ja|千勝社 (久喜市上早見)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki, Kamihayami)|qq=}} (Saitama Prefecture, Kuki City) - Former Village shrine.
'''Chikatsu Shrine''' (近津神社) refers to multiple {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} across Japan. There are 23 shrines officially named Chikatsu Shrine and 3 shrines with "Chikatsu" included in their names.
== '''Chikatsu Shrines''' ([[:ja:近津神社|近津神社]]) == Many of these shrines are dedicated to {{ill|Chikatō-no-Kami|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} === Tōhoku Region === * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja|近津神社 (郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550782|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kōriyama)}} - Located in Abeshrine, Asaka Town, Kōriyama City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Shirakawa)|ja|近津神社 (白河市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Shirakawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550784|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Shirakawa)}} - Located in Higashikamino, Shirakawa City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Yabuki Town)|ja|近津神社 (福島県矢吹町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Yabuki Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550785|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Yabuki Town)}} - Located in Matsukura, Yabuki Town, Nishishirakawa District, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Tanagura Town)|ja|近津神社 (福島県棚倉町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Tanagura Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550786|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Tanagura Town)}} - Located in Yamata, Tanagura Town, Higashishirakawa District, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Hanawa Town)|ja|近津神社 (福島県塙町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Hanawa Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550787|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Hanawa Town)}} - Located in Yamashiro, Hanawa Town, Higashishirakawa District, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Yamatsuri Town)|ja|近津神社 (福島県矢祭町関岡)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Yamatsuri Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550788|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Yamatsuri Town)}} - Located in Sekizuka, Yamatsuri Town, Higashishirakawa District, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Takano, Yamatsuri)|ja|近津神社 (福島県矢祭町高野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Takano, Yamatsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550789|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Takano, Yamatsuri)}} - Located in Takano, Yamatsuri Town, Higashishirakawa District, Fukushima Prefecture. === Kantō Region === * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Hitachiōta)|ja|近津神社 (常陸太田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Hitachiōta)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550790|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Hitachiōta)}} - Located in Yakudani, Hitachiōta City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kashima)|ja|近津神社 (鹿嶋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550791|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kashima)}} - Located in Tsuga, Kashima City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Atama)|ja|近津神社 (鉾田市阿玉)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Atama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550792|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Atama)}} - Located in Atama, Hokota City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Kumiage)|ja|近津神社 (鉾田市汲上)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Kumiage)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550793|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Kumiage)}} - Located in Kumiage, Hokota City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Ōkura)|ja|近津神社 (鉾田市大蔵)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Ōkura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135551172|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Hokota, Ōkura)}} - Located in Ōkura, Hokota City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Kaminomiya)|ja|近津神社 (茨城県大子町上野宮)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Kaminomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550795|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Kaminomiya)}} - Located in Kaminomiya, Daigo Town, Kuji District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Shimonomiya)|ja|近津神社 (茨城県大子町下野宮)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Shimonomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550796|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Shimonomiya)}} - Located in Shimonomiya, Daigo Town, Kuji District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Machitsuke)|ja|近津神社 (茨城県大子町町付)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Machitsuke)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550797|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Daigo, Machitsuke)}} - Located in Machitsuke, Daigo Town, Kuji District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Tochigi)|ja|近津神社 (栃木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550799|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Tochigi)}} - Located in Honjō, Nishikata Town, Tochigi City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Nasu)|ja|近津神社 (栃木県那須町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Nasu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550800|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Nasu)}} - Located in Ōhata, Nasu Town, Nasu District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Mōka)|ja|近津神社 (栃木県茂木町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Mōka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550801|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Mōka)}} - Located in Sakai, Mōka Town, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Sugito)|ja|近津神社 (埼玉県杉戸町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Sugito)|qq=}} - Located in Seichi, Sugito Town, Kitakatsushika District, Saitama Prefecture. === Chūbu Region and Beyond === * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Saku)|ja|近津神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Saku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550802|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Saku)}} - Located in Nagatoro, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu-O Shrine|ja|近津尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu-O Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Kokubu, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Ono)|ja|近津神社 (小野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Ono)|qq=}} - Located in Aono, Ono City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Nogata)|ja|近津神社 (直方市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Nogata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550803|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Nogata)}} - Located in Tonno, Nogata City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikōzu Kashima Shrine|ja|近津鹿島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikōzu Kashima Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Matsuo Town, Kumamoto City, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kinkō Town)|ja|近津神社 (鹿児島県錦江町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kinkō Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550804|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kinkō Town)}} - Located in Tashiro, Kinkō Town, Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Chikatsu-Miya Shrine|ja|近津宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu-Miya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135550805|1=Chikatsu-Miya Shrine}} - Located in Sata District, Minamiosumi Town, Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima Prefecture. {{disambiguation}}
{{disambiguation}} {{disambiguation}}
